---
title: "Exploratory Analysis"
author: "Maeve Gualtieri-Reed"
date: "2026-04-03"
output: pdf_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# setup
```{r}
library(here)
library(tseries)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(cowplot)
library(forecast)
library(readxl)
```

# Load in the data
```{r}
#load in data

raw_Std <- read.csv(file="./data/processed/Std_household_load.csv",
                            header=TRUE) %>%
  mutate(datetime = ymd_hms(datetime_utc, tz = "UTC")) %>% 
  mutate(cluster = as.character(cluster)) %>% 
  select("datetime","cluster","load_kwh") %>% 
  mutate(cluster = paste("Std",cluster))


raw_ToU <- read.csv(file="./data/processed/ToU_household_load.csv",
                            header=TRUE) %>%
  mutate(datetime = ymd_hms(datetime_utc, tz = "UTC")) %>% 
  mutate(cluster = as.character(cluster)) %>% 
  select("datetime","cluster","load_kwh") %>% 
  mutate(cluster = paste("ToU",cluster))

tariff_raw <- read_xlsx(path="./data/raw/Tariffs.xlsx") %>% 
   mutate(
    date = as.Date(TariffDateTime),         
    hour = hour(TariffDateTime),            
    minute = minute(TariffDateTime)         
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    datehour = floor_date(TariffDateTime, unit = "hour")
  ) %>% 
  select("datehour","minute","Tariff") %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = minute,
    values_from = Tariff
  ) %>% 
  rename("Min0" = `0`, "Min30" = `30`) %>% 
  mutate(
    HourRate = case_when(
      (Min0 == "High" & Min30 != "Low") | (Min30 == "High" & Min0 != "Low") ~ "High",
      (Min0 == "Low" & Min30 != "High") | (Min30 == "Low" & Min0 != "High") ~ "Low",
      TRUE ~ "Normal"
    )
  ) %>% 
  select("datehour","HourRate") %>% 
  mutate(HourRate = factor(HourRate,
                      levels = c("Low", "Normal", "High"),
                      ordered = TRUE)) %>% 
  mutate(HourRateLevel = as.numeric(HourRate))
```

# Visualize the raw data

```{r}

raw_all <- rbind(raw_Std,raw_ToU)

#raw visualization
raw_all_plot<- ggplot(raw_all)+
  geom_line(aes(x = datetime, y = load_kwh,color = cluster), alpha = 0.6)+
  labs(x = "Date and Time", y = "Load (kWh)")+
  ggtitle("Standard and Time of Use Demand Clustered Households, 
          2012 and 2013")+
  theme_bw()+
  scale_color_manual(
     values = c("Std 1" = "goldenrod1", "Std 2" = "red", "ToU 1" ="darkgreen", "ToU 2" = "blue"))

raw_all_plot
  

ggsave("figures/all_data.png", plot = raw_all_plot,width = 8, height = 4, dpi = 300)

#2012 visualization
raw_Std_2012 <- raw_Std %>% 
  filter(year(datetime)==2012)

raw_ToU_2012 <- raw_ToU %>% 
  filter(year(datetime)==2012)

raw_all_2012 <- rbind(raw_Std_2012,raw_ToU_2012)

raw_ToU_2012_plot<- ggplot(raw_ToU_2012)+
  geom_line(aes(x = datetime, y = load_kwh,color = cluster), alpha = 0.5)+
  labs(x = "Date and Time", y = "Load (kWh)")+
  ggtitle("Time of Use Demand Clustered Households, 2012")+
  theme_bw()
raw_ToU_2012_plot
ggsave("figures/ToU2012_data.png", plot = raw_ToU_2012_plot,width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
#2013 visualization with ToU tariff

raw_ToU_2013 <- raw_ToU %>% 
  filter(year(datetime)==2013 & month(datetime)==3 & cluster == "ToU 1")

tariffs_2013 <- tariff_raw %>% 
  filter(year(datehour)==2013 & month(datehour)==3)

March_ToU1<- ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = raw_ToU_2013,
            aes(x = datetime, y = load_kwh),
            alpha = 0.5) +
      geom_point(data = tariffs_2013,
            aes(x = datehour, y = HourRateLevel*0.45, color = HourRate), size = 0.5)+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Low" = "darkgreen", "Normal" = "orange", "High" = "red"))+
  labs(x = "Date and Time", y = "Load (kWh)")+
  ggtitle("ToU 1 Load and Time of Use Tariff Level, March 2013")+
  theme_bw()

ggsave("figures/March_ToU1.png", plot = March_ToU1,width = 8, height = 4, dpi = 300)

```

#Process data

```{r}
processed_Std_2012 <- raw_Std %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = cluster,
              values_from = load_kwh) %>% 
  select("datetime","Std 1","Std 2") %>% 
  filter(year(datetime) == 2012)

processed_ToU_2012 <- raw_ToU %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = cluster,
              values_from = load_kwh) %>% 
  select("datetime","ToU 1","ToU 2") %>% 
  filter(year(datetime) == 2012)

processed_Std_2013 <- raw_Std %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = cluster,
              values_from = load_kwh) %>% 
  select("datetime","Std 1","Std 2") %>% 
  filter(year(datetime) == 2013)

processed_ToU_2013 <- raw_ToU %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = cluster,
              values_from = load_kwh) %>% 
  select("datetime","ToU 1","ToU 2") %>% 
  filter(year(datetime) == 2013)

```

#Convert to ts

```{r}

#2012
ts_Std1_2012 <- msts(processed_Std_2012$`Std 1`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2012,1,0)) 

ts_Std2_2012 <- msts(processed_Std_2012$`Std 2`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2012,1,0)) 

ts_ToU1_2012 <- msts(processed_ToU_2012$`ToU 1`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2012,1,0)) 

ts_ToU2_2012 <- msts(processed_ToU_2012$`ToU 2`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2012,1,0)) 

#2013

ts_Std1_2013 <- msts(processed_Std_2013$`Std 1`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2013,1,0)) 

ts_Std2_2013 <- msts(processed_Std_2013$`Std 2`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2013,1,0)) 

ts_ToU1_2013 <- msts(processed_ToU_2013$`ToU 1`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2013,1,0)) 

ts_ToU2_2013 <- msts(processed_ToU_2013$`ToU 2`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2013,1,0))

```

# Decomposition

```{r}
#std1 decomposition
Std1_2012_decomp <- ts_Std1_2012 %>% mstl() 
Std1_2012_decomp_plot<- autoplot(Std1_2012_decomp)

ggsave("figures/Std1_2012_decomp_plot.png", plot = Std1_2012_decomp_plot,width = 4, height = 5, dpi = 300)

#std2 decomp
Std2_2012_decomp <- ts_Std2_2012 %>% mstl() 
Std2_2012_decomp_plot<- autoplot(Std2_2012_decomp)

ggsave("figures/Std2_2012_decomp_plot.png", plot = Std2_2012_decomp_plot,width = 4, height = 5, dpi = 300)

#tou1 decomposition
ToU1_2012_decomp <- ts_ToU1_2012 %>% mstl() 
ToU1_2012_decomp_plot<- autoplot(ToU1_2012_decomp)

ggsave("figures/ToU1_2012_decomp_plot.png", plot = ToU1_2012_decomp_plot,width = 4, height = 5, dpi = 300)

#tou2 decomp
ToU2_2012_decomp <- ts_ToU2_2012 %>% mstl() 
ToU2_2012_decomp_plot<- autoplot(ToU2_2012_decomp)

ggsave("figures/ToU2_2012_decomp_plot.png", plot = ToU2_2012_decomp_plot,width = 4, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

# ACF and PACF 

```{r}

#Std 1 ACF PACF
std1_ACF<- autoplot(Acf(Std1_2012_decomp[,"Remainder"], lag.max = 72,plot = FALSE), main ="")
ggsave("figures/std1_ACF.png", plot = std1_ACF,width = 3, height = 3, dpi = 300)


#removing deterministic trend and seasonal components did not account for all residuals
std1_PACF<-autoplot(Pacf(Std1_2012_decomp[,"Remainder"], lag.max = 72,plot = FALSE), main = "")
ggsave("figures/std1_PACF.png", plot = std1_PACF,width = 3, height = 3, dpi = 300)

#Std 2 ACF PACF

std2_ACF<-autoplot(Acf(Std2_2012_decomp[,"Remainder"], lag.max = 72,plot = FALSE), main ="")
ggsave("figures/std2_ACF.png", plot = std2_ACF,width = 3, height = 3, dpi = 300)

std2_PACF<-autoplot(Pacf(Std2_2012_decomp[,"Remainder"], lag.max = 72,plot = FALSE), main ="")
ggsave("figures/std2_PACF.png", plot = std2_PACF,width = 3, height = 3, dpi = 300)


#ToU 1 ACF PACF

ToU1_ACF<- autoplot(Acf(ToU1_2012_decomp[,"Remainder"], lag.max = 60,plot = FALSE), main ="")
ggsave("figures/ToU1_ACF.png", plot = ToU1_ACF,width = 3, height = 3, dpi = 300)

ToU1_PACF<- autoplot(Pacf(ToU1_2012_decomp[,"Remainder"], lag.max = 60,plot = FALSE), main = "")
ggsave("figures/ToU1_PACF.png", plot = ToU1_PACF,width = 3, height = 3, dpi = 300)


#ToU 2 ACF PACF

ToU2_ACF<- autoplot(Acf(ToU2_2012_decomp[,"Remainder"], lag.max = 60,plot = FALSE), main ="")
ggsave("figures/ToU2_ACF.png", plot = ToU2_ACF,width = 3, height = 3, dpi = 300)

ToU2_PACF<- autoplot(Pacf(ToU2_2012_decomp[,"Remainder"], lag.max = 60,plot = FALSE), main = "")
ggsave("figures/ToU2_PACF.png", plot = ToU2_PACF,width = 3, height = 3, dpi = 300)


```

```
